commands.review_summary:
The branch adds structured audio normalization, CSP media allowances, inline-audio history handling, and focused gateway/UI tests for webchat TTS audio replies, while also removing one exec-approval truncation test.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main emits structured `type: "audio"` blocks, while the UI normalizer/renderer only treats `type: "attachment"` as renderable media. I did not run a live browser/TTS reproduction.
